headline: Assessing Honeywell International (HON) After The Planned Three-Way Breakup Announcement
summary: If you are wondering whether Honeywell International at around US$216 per share is offering good value today, the key is to look past the headline price and into what different valuation methods are actually saying. The stock has returned 0.8% over the last week, a 3.5% decline over the last 30 days, 10.3% year to date, 9.2% over 1 year, 25.4% over 3 years and 13.1% over 5 years. This gives you a mix of shorter term hesitation and longer term strength to weigh up. Recent coverage of...
